name: Olokkhis In Goa
overview: Barsha, Titas, Ranita and Hoi travel to Goa to celebrate a bachelorette. Their dream trip soon turns into a nightmare, when a stripper they hire, turns up dead in Ranita's bed.

trailers.title: Olokkhis In Goa | Official Trailer | Anuradha | Avery | Priyanka | Debraj | KLiKK
